expectations.text: The review identifies the missing await on db.orders.update()
expectations.evidence: Line 11: 'The call to db.orders.update(orderId, ...) is missing an await keyword'

expectations.text: The review explains the consequence (update may not complete, race condition, or unhandled rejection)
expectations.evidence: Line 12: 'The function proceeds to send the email and returns { success: true } before the database update actually completes... may result in an unhandled promise rejection'

expectations.text: The review suggests adding await to db.orders.update()
expectations.evidence: Line 13: 'Add await to the call: await db.orders.update(orderId, ...);'

claims.claim: The review also identified missing email error handling and unsafe type assertion
claims.evidence: Lines 15-25 cover email error handling warning and type assertion suggestion
